channel.title: tigressassassin TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from tigressassassin

item.title: My heart is ACHING for warm weather ☹️ #bikelife #bikergirl #r6 #bikersoftiktok #fyp
item.description: My heart is ACHING for warm weather ☹️ #bikelife #bikergirl #r6 #bikersoftiktok #fyp
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: i’m proud of myself, it’s surreal to reflect on what i’ve endured and the grim promise I made to myself. I genuinely didn’t think I’d allow myself to get this far, i’m so glad I did! #bikelife #bikergirl #fyp #bikersoftiktok
item.description: i’m proud of myself, it’s surreal to reflect on what i’ve endured and the grim promise I made to myself. I genuinely didn’t think I’d allow myself to get this far, i’m so glad I did! #bikelife #bikergirl #fyp #bikersoftiktok
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: if you look close enough, there’s a little fly on the top of my helmet ruining my aura 😂🪰 🎥: @Spool Street Media #bikelife #bikergirl #bikersofinstagram #r6 #fyp
item.description: if you look close enough, there’s a little fly on the top of my helmet ruining my aura 😂🪰 🎥: @Spool Street Media #bikelife #bikergirl #bikersofinstagram #r6 #fyp
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: Where there’s good, there’s bad. Make sure you’re appropriately weighing the pros and cons of this hobby. I also hate that it has to be said, but I didn’t use ChatGPT for this. I scoured the Internet for this info and put the hyphens and em dashes there
item.description: Where there’s good, there’s bad. Make sure you’re appropriately weighing the pros and cons of this hobby. I also hate that it has to be said, but I didn’t use ChatGPT for this. I scoured the Internet for this info and put the hyphens and em dashes there
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: GAHHH i love women & my girlsssss🥹🥹 I got this fantastic idea from @auntie_kale on Instagram, i could make so many of these from all my wonderful ladies 😭🤍 🎥: @Spool Street Media #bikergirl #bikelife #bikersoftiktok #r6 #fyp
item.description: GAHHH i love women & my girlsssss🥹🥹 I got this fantastic idea from @auntie_kale on Instagram, i could make so many of these from all my wonderful ladies 😭🤍 🎥: @Spool Street Media #bikergirl #bikelife #bikersoftiktok #r6 #fyp
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: 🔞 fighting for my life EVERY day 😭 and this isn’t even the worst of it @Asmodeus #bikelife #bikercouple #funny #fyp #bikersofinstagram
item.description: 🔞 fighting for my life EVERY day 😭 and this isn’t even the worst of it @Asmodeus #bikelife #bikercouple #funny #fyp #bikersofinstagram
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: Here are some things I personally wish I knew before getting into motorcycling! #bikelife #bikergirl #fyp #bikersoftiktok #bikertips
item.description: Here are some things I personally wish I knew before getting into motorcycling! #bikelife #bikergirl #fyp #bikersoftiktok #bikertips
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: i’m so sorry to every man i ever laughed at cause that shit hurt #bikelife #funny #bikercouple #fyp #bikersoftiktok
item.description: i’m so sorry to every man i ever laughed at cause that shit hurt #bikelife #funny #bikercouple #fyp #bikersoftiktok
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: i can never do anything 😤 ———————————— GEAR: Helmet: Nexx R3R Shirt: Pando Moto Shell (code tigress) Pants: Saint CC women’s unbreakable high waisted skinny jeans Gloves: Alpinestar Stella SMX-1 Air v2 Boots: Alpinestar Stella SMX-6 V3 Boots Links in my
item.description: i can never do anything 😤 ———————————— GEAR: Helmet: Nexx R3R Shirt: Pando Moto Shell (code tigress) Pants: Saint CC women’s unbreakable high waisted skinny jeans Gloves: Alpinestar Stella SMX-1 Air v2 Boots: Alpinestar Stella SMX-6 V3 Boots Links in my
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: When asking for content ideas during the winter, I had a few people ask for my experience as a rider with chronic illness. I have POTS (Postural Orthostatic Tachycardia Syndrome), Small Fiber neuropathy (nerve damage), and we are exploring EDS (Ehlers Dan
item.description: When asking for content ideas during the winter, I had a few people ask for my experience as a rider with chronic illness. I have POTS (Postural Orthostatic Tachycardia Syndrome), Small Fiber neuropathy (nerve damage), and we are exploring EDS (Ehlers Dan
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: I feel like it’s often assumed amongst new riders that you can just get on a motorcycle and go. There is SO much to motorcycling that I feel like is overlooked and/or not talked about enough, especially with the rise of attention to motorcycling via socia
item.description: I feel like it’s often assumed amongst new riders that you can just get on a motorcycle and go. There is SO much to motorcycling that I feel like is overlooked and/or not talked about enough, especially with the rise of attention to motorcycling via socia
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: no idea what she meant (hb means homeboy btw) #bikelife #bikergirl #fyp #funny #r6
item.description: no idea what she meant (hb means homeboy btw) #bikelife #bikergirl #fyp #funny #r6
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: can’t wait to get more rollers this year 🎥: @Spool Street Media #bikergirl #bikelife #bikersoftiktok #fyp #r6
item.description: can’t wait to get more rollers this year 🎥: @Spool Street Media #bikergirl #bikelife #bikersoftiktok #fyp #r6
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: My dreams certainly come with their challenges. Some days are so hard. But I can’t let my downfalls take everything from me. ❤️‍🩹 I got this inspiring video idea from ari.gyms on instagram 🤍 #bikelife #chronicillness #bikersoftiktok #fyp #bikergirl
item.description: My dreams certainly come with their challenges. Some days are so hard. But I can’t let my downfalls take everything from me. ❤️‍🩹 I got this inspiring video idea from ari.gyms on instagram 🤍 #bikelife #chronicillness #bikersoftiktok #fyp #bikergirl
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: i had to hop on this trend because we all know how i tip toe backing up 😂😂 I’ll typically put it in neutral and grab the tank, but I also like to make life harder for myself lol ALSO realized right before i left the parking lot that i forgot my gloves 🤣
item.description: i had to hop on this trend because we all know how i tip toe backing up 😂😂 I’ll typically put it in neutral and grab the tank, but I also like to make life harder for myself lol ALSO realized right before i left the parking lot that i forgot my gloves 🤣
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: i keep seeing this trend using the word “lucky” & had to do my own take on it. It wasn’t luck that these men got, they earned it by being a good person 🥹🙌🏻 (& if you’re offended by the term ‘man hater’ ask yourself why that bothers you lol) @Asmodeus #bi
item.description: i keep seeing this trend using the word “lucky” & had to do my own take on it. It wasn’t luck that these men got, they earned it by being a good person 🥹🙌🏻 (& if you’re offended by the term ‘man hater’ ask yourself why that bothers you lol) @Asmodeus #bi
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: i love him so much @Asmodeus #bikelife #bikercouple #biketok #fyp #trend
item.description: i love him so much @Asmodeus #bikelife #bikercouple #biketok #fyp #trend
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: i do not care how silly it looks 😂 i’m so tired of my hair getting destroyed by the wind. i hope this can help other long haired folk!! I found this hack from @Moshpit_barbie !! #bikelife #bikergirl #womenwhoride #fyp #biketok
item.description: i do not care how silly it looks 😂 i’m so tired of my hair getting destroyed by the wind. i hope this can help other long haired folk!! I found this hack from @Moshpit_barbie !! #bikelife #bikergirl #womenwhoride #fyp #biketok
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: no lies detected @Asmodeus @Breakdowns in Bed with the sick audio 🤘🏻 #bikelife #bikercouple #fyp #biketok #bikersoftiktok
item.description: no lies detected @Asmodeus @Breakdowns in Bed with the sick audio 🤘🏻 #bikelife #bikercouple #fyp #biketok #bikersoftiktok
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: these biker men got audacity smh this is a joke, i was giggling before, during, and after the making of this😂 @Asmodeus #bikelife #bikercouple #fyp #funny #biketok
item.description: these biker men got audacity smh this is a joke, i was giggling before, during, and after the making of this😂 @Asmodeus #bikelife #bikercouple #fyp #funny #biketok

item.title: I had fun 🤩 lmao ———————————— GEAR: Helmet: Shoei X-15 Shirt: Pando Moto Shell (under sweatshirt) - Code Tigress Pants: Saint CC jeans - Code Tigress Boots: Alpinestar Stella SMX-6 V3 Boots Gloves: Saint CC road 2 gloves - Code Tigress Links in my Link
item.description: I had fun 🤩 lmao ———————————— GEAR: Helmet: Shoei X-15 Shirt: Pando Moto Shell (under sweatshirt) - Code Tigress Pants: Saint CC jeans - Code Tigress Boots: Alpinestar Stella SMX-6 V3 Boots Gloves: Saint CC road 2 gloves - Code Tigress Links in my Link
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: New year new look 🫰🏻🙂‍↕️ for me, not the bike. although i do have some plans for the bike this year 🫢 #bikelife #bikergirl #fyp #r6 #biketok
item.description: New year new look 🫰🏻🙂‍↕️ for me, not the bike. although i do have some plans for the bike this year 🫢 #bikelife #bikergirl #fyp #r6 #biketok
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: I really don’t know what his issue was 😭 maybe he thought my downshift was a rev, but he looked old enough to know what a downshift sounds like lmao and i know it looks like he was a lot further away but i cannot stress enough how actually deceiving camer
item.description: I really don’t know what his issue was 😭 maybe he thought my downshift was a rev, but he looked old enough to know what a downshift sounds like lmao and i know it looks like he was a lot further away but i cannot stress enough how actually deceiving camer
item.author: tigressassassin

item.title: EVERY time i wanna do something even a LITTLE risky there’s ALWAYS a cop. I can’t do anything 😤😤 ——————————————— GEAR: Helmet: Shoei X-15 Shirt: Pando Moto Shell Pants: Saint CC Coretec 12oz skinny jeans Boots: Alpinestar Stella SMX-6 V3 Boots Gloves: S
